question: Identify the root cause of the network fault: which device, what changed, and why it breaks.
description:
R4 (PE2) installs an outbound DENY route-policy on both RR neighbors
(R3 and R7). The TCP sessions stay Established, but R4 advertises zero
prefixes upstream. RRs see R4 as a peer with no NLRI; R2 and R6 stop
receiving any R4-originated routes (Loopback0 192.0.2.4, R4-R7 link
192.0.0.24/30, R4-R5 link 192.0.0.28/30). Black hole for R4-attached
customer subnets.
expected_rca:
Root cause: on 100.64.0.104 (R4, PE2), an outbound DENY route-policy was installed on both RR neighbors (R3 and R7).
The outbound policy drops every prefix R4 would advertise, so R4 originates no NLRI to the RRs; the RRs therefore have nothing from R4 to reflect, and R2/R6 never learn any R4-originated routes (Loopback0 192.0.2.4 and the R4-R7 / R4-R5 link prefixes), blackholing R4-attached subnets.
Fix: restore route-policy PASS out on both R4 RR neighbors (R3 and R7) and remove the DENY policy.
expected_symptoms_summary:
No fault syslog observed after apply — silent scenario; the BGP
sessions stay Established and the breakage is policy-only.
Diagnostic ground truth lives in expected_state_diffs.
expected_state_diffs: R4 `show running-config route-policy DENY`: returns `drop`. Bound as outbound policy on RR neighbors 192.0.2.3 and 192.0.2.7 (baseline: `route-policy PASS out`).
R4 `show bgp neighbors 192.0.2.3 detail`: `Advertised: 0 prefixes` (baseline: R4 advertises its loopback + connected prefixes upstream).
R2 / R6 `show bgp ipv4 unicast`: prefixes 192.0.2.4/32, 192.0.0.24/30, 192.0.0.28/30 absent (baseline: present via R3/R7 RR reflection).
Direction asymmetric: R4 still RECEIVES inbound prefixes from R3/R7 normally (route-policy PASS in untouched on those neighbors).

apply.commands:
configure terminal
route-policy DENY
  drop
end-policy
!
router bgp 65000
neighbor 192.0.2.3
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  route-policy DENY out
!
neighbor 192.0.2.7
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  route-policy DENY out

revert.commands:
configure terminal
router bgp 65000
neighbor 192.0.2.3
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  route-policy PASS out
!
neighbor 192.0.2.7
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  route-policy PASS out
!
no route-policy DENY
